title: CLI vs MCP: Which Should You Use for Building AI Agents? #LearnOnShorts
description_preview:
Brace Sproul and Jake Broekhuizen break down when to use MCP servers vs CLIs when building AI agents. MCPs give you enterprise-grade auth, human-in-the-loop permissioning, and richer tool access — but at a steep token cost. CLIs are leaner and work best when the model already knows the interface.

#Shorts #AIAgents #MCP #CLI
